completed_steps.summary: Classified as monorepo with 6 primary parts (Layer 1 Final, Layer 2, phase1, src, shared, examples)
Identified 100+ markdown files including core curriculum READMEs, teaching guides, and roadmap v9.
Tech stack: Python 3.10, Pydantic v2, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, CrewAI, AutoGen, and ChromaDB.
Extracted pedagogical DNA: Guided Discovery, Teaching Ladder, and Anti-Vibe Coding principles.
Generated project-overview.md and supporting curriculum documentation.
Generated master index.md for curriculum navigation.
